activeTheme.description: Theme to apply, or "random" to pick a different one per notification. Must be "random" or a key under "themes".

events.description: Per-event card appearance. Events are fired by the Stop hook (done) and the Notification hook (needs-input).

label.description: Bold status text in the card header.

accent.description: Colour of the header label text (#RRGGBB).

indicator.description: "fireworks" for the animated burst, or any emoji to show as the badge. Empty = built-in default.

mascot.description: Mascot choreography. The look-around and the jump onto the card edge always play; these two phases follow it.

move.description: How the mascot crosses the edge to its spot: walk, or a horizontal jump.

sound.description: Windows system sound. Empty = built-in default; any other value falls back to asterisk.

body.description: Card body, one entry per line. A line whose tokens all resolve empty is dropped.

footer.description: Badges shown in a row below the body. A badge whose tokens all resolve empty is dropped.

text.description: Line text. Supports {{token}} replacements: folder, cwd, repo, branch, dirty, message, last_prompt, last_assistant, model, agents, pending_tool, permission_mode, event.

style.description: headline = large white; sub = medium white; muted = small grey.

badge.description: Badge text. Supports {{token}} replacements; dropped if all its tokens resolve empty.
badge.markdownDescription: Badge text. Supports `{{token}}` replacements (same set as body lines). Dropped if all its tokens resolve empty.

hero.description: Emoji rendered large behind the card. A bare string is filled with the theme gradient; the object form recolours the silhouette.

color.description: Single fixed fill colour (#RRGGBB or a named colour, e.g. "white").

colors.description: Fill colours rendered as equal hard-edged bands; two give a 50/50 split (e.g. the red/blue pill).

scene.description: Optional animated backdrop for the theme.

kind.description: Scenery renderer: "waves" (ocean), "space" (cosmic), "matrix" (digital rain), "sakura" (cherry-blossom petals), "unicorn" (rainbow / aurora / glitter / pastel), "spooky" (Halloween / haunted), "dragon" (embers / fire / treasure), "robot" (circuit board / pulses / status LEDs / signal rings) or "vaporwave" (80s outrun: sun / grid / scanlines).

colors.description: Colours the scene cycles. Defaults to the theme's gradient colours.

sky.description: waves: draw a sky+sea gradient above the waves.

sun.description: waves: draw a glowing sun in the sky (needs "sky").

clouds.description: waves: draw drifting clouds in the sky (needs "sky").

nebula.description: space: draw soft drifting nebula glow.

density.description: matrix: fraction of columns that carry a glyph stream (default 0.85).

glyphs.description: matrix: glyph repertoire for the rain (default "katakana").

streaks.description: matrix: draw soft vertical glow bands behind the rain.

petals.description: sakura: draw falling cherry-blossom petals (default true).

count.description: sakura: number of background petals (default 22); dragon: number of rising embers (default 30).

bloom.description: sakura: draw soft drifting pink/lilac bokeh glows.

branch.description: sakura: draw a blossom branch in the top-left corner.

parallax.description: sakura: add a few large fast foreground petals for depth.

sparkles.description: unicorn: scatter twinkling sparkles across the card.

rainbow.description: unicorn: draw the arching rainbow bands.

aurora.description: unicorn: draw a soft drifting aurora glow (night motif).

glitter.description: unicorn: draw a shimmering glitter dust layer.

moon.description: spooky: draw a pale full moon with a soft halo.

fog.description: spooky: draw low drifting mist bands along the bottom.

gravestones.description: spooky: draw a gravestone silhouette along the bottom edge.

ghosts.description: spooky: draw pale ghost wisps rising and fading.

bats.description: spooky: draw small bat silhouettes flapping across.

eyes.description: spooky: draw pairs of glowing eyes that blink in the dark.

lightning.description: spooky: draw occasional full-card lightning flashes.

embers.description: dragon: draw rising glowing ember sparks (default true).

glow.description: dragon: warm fire glow from the bottom edge; robot: soft cyan depth blooms behind the board; vaporwave: neon bloom band along the horizon.

base.description: robot: base layer — "circuit" (full-card PCB trace mesh with travelling pulses) or "none" (default "circuit"). Mutually exclusive.

leds.description: robot: draw blinking status LEDs (green / amber / red / cyan) (default true).

rings.description: robot: draw expanding broadcast signal rings from node points (default true).

bottom.description: dragon: bottom layer — "lava" (molten pool), "treasure" (gold hoard) or "none" (default "lava"). Mutually exclusive.

smoke.description: dragon: draw dark smoke wisps rising above the bottom layer.

volcano.description: dragon: draw a distant volcano mountain backdrop (cone, crater glow, ejected sparks).

haze.description: vaporwave: draw a sunset sky wash (pink/purple/cyan).

mountains.description: vaporwave: draw a neon wireframe mountain ridge on the horizon.

grid.description: vaporwave: draw a receding neon perspective grid.

palms.description: vaporwave: draw palm silhouettes framing the corners.

scanlines.description: vaporwave: draw rolling VHS scanlines over the card.
